items.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
items.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

items.title: Russia and Ukraine announce rival ceasefires as deadly strikes continue
items.summary: Russia demanded a ceasefire on 8 and 9 May but Ukraine said it would pause the fighting sooner, meaning any violations would be pinned on Moscow.

items.title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
items.summary: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Some on-air claims about Dominion Voting Systems were false, Fox News acknowledges in statement after deal is announced
Dominion still has pending lawsuits against election deniers such as Rudy Giuliani and Sidney Powell
Here are the 20 specific Fox broadcasts and tweets Dominion says were defamatory
items.summary: • Fox-Dominion trial delay 'is not unusual,' judge says • Fox News' defamation battle isn't stopping Trump's election lies

items.title: 郵輪疑漢他病毒釀3死 日專家：不同類型致死率差異大
items.summary: 荷蘭籍郵輪「洪迪亞斯號」出現漢他病毒病例，已造成3名乘客死亡。最新消息指出，約150名乘客中有1名為日本籍；日本專家表示，根據文獻，若為影響腎臟的類型，致死率約10%至20%；若影響肺部呼吸...…

items.title: 無視伊朗軍事行動  美國防部：未達重啟戰爭門檻
items.summary: 華爾街日報報導，美國參謀首長聯席會議主席凱恩（Dan Caine）5日指出，自美伊停火協議生效以來，伊朗的軍事行動，包括對商船開火、扣押兩艘船隻等，都未升級至「重啟戰爭的門檻」...…

items.title: 馬斯克、祖克柏化身機器狗 「常規動物」柏林展出吸睛
items.summary: 曾以新台幣約21億元賣出數位作品的美國藝術家Beeple，本月把實體創作「常規動物」帶到柏林。作品將馬斯克、祖克柏等科技巨頭化身機器狗，憑強烈視覺效果在社群媒體爆紅。Beeple接受中央社訪...…
